summary: Iteration 17 - WhatsApp & Instagram Integration Testing Complete. All 15/15 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend WhatsApp page verified with all 6 tabs, 5 templates, config status, and mock warning banner working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp Business API service correctly operates in mock mode when credentials not configured
Instagram Messaging API service follows same pattern with mock mode support
Webhook router correctly processes Meta's WhatsApp payload format (entry.changes.value.messages)
Webhook router correctly processes Instagram's payload format (entry.messaging)
Chatbot engine processes messages through webhooks and returns appropriate responses
All interactive and status endpoints return proper JSON structure

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 6 tabs, 5 templates, stat cards, config status, mock warning working)

seed_data_creation: Test data created via webhook POST requests during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified WhatsApp & Instagram integration features: (1) GET /api/webhooks/status returns both platform configs with verify_tokens and message counts, (2) GET /api/whatsapp/templates returns 5 templates with params, (3) GET /api/whatsapp/config shows configured=false, has_token=false, has_phone_id=false in mock mode, (4) POST /api/whatsapp/send works in mock mode with phone normalization, (5) POST /api/webhooks/whatsapp processes text and interactive button messages, (6) POST /api/webhooks/instagram processes DM messages, (7) GET /api/whatsapp/sessions and /api/whatsapp/messages return stored conversations, (8) GET /api/webhooks/instagram/sessions and /messages return Instagram conversations, (9) Frontend WhatsApp page has 6 tabs: Bildirimler, WhatsApp, Instagram, Sablonlar, Mesaj Gonder, Ayarlar, (10) Frontend shows mock warning when API not configured, (11) Frontend displays webhook URLs for Meta configuration.

backend_apis.GET /api/webhooks/status: PASS - Returns WhatsApp and Instagram config status
backend_apis.GET /api/whatsapp/config: PASS - Returns configured=false in mock mode
backend_apis.POST /api/whatsapp/send: PASS - Mock sends message, normalizes phone

mocked_apis_list: WhatsApp Business Cloud API - messages stored in DB but not actually sent
Instagram Messaging API - messages stored in DB but not actually sent
